paper_metadata.title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models
paper_metadata.abstract: This report introduces a new family of multimodal models, Gemini, that exhibit remarkable capabilities across image, audio, video, and text understanding. The Gemini family consists of Ultra, Pro, and Nano sizes, suitable for applications ranging from complex reasoning tasks to on-device memory-constrained use-cases. Evaluation on a broad range of benchmarks shows that our most-capable Gemini Ultra model advances the state of the art in 30 of 32 of these benchmarks - notably being the first model to achieve human-expert performance on the well-studied exam benchmark MMLU, and improving the state of the art in every one of the 20 multimodal benchmarks we examined. We believe that the new capabilities of the Gemini family in cross-modal reasoning and language understanding will enable a wide variety of use cases. We discuss our approach toward post-training and deploying Gemini models responsibly to users through services including Gemini, Gemini Advanced, Google AI Studio, and Cloud Vertex AI.

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Ultra is a highly capable multimodal model trained across image, audio, video, and text data, with strong generalist capabilities across modalities and cutting-edge understanding and reasoning performance in each domain.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: image, audio, video, and text data
extraction_data.research_problem: Building a model with strong generalist capabilities across modalities alongside cutting-edge understanding and reasoning performance in each respective domain
extraction_data.finetuning_task: post-training to improve overall quality, enhance target capabilities, and ensure alignment and safety criteria are met
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Pro is a highly capable multimodal model trained across image, audio, video, and text data, optimized for enhanced performance and deployability at scale.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: image, audio, video, and text data
extraction_data.application: enhanced performance and deployability at scale
extraction_data.research_problem: Building a model with strong generalist capabilities across modalities alongside cutting-edge understanding and reasoning performance in each respective domain
extraction_data.finetuning_task: post-training to improve overall quality, enhance target capabilities, and ensure alignment and safety criteria are met
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Nano is a series of small multimodal models targeting on-device deployment, excelling in on-device tasks such as summarization, reading comprehension, text completion, and exhibiting impressive capabilities in reasoning, STEM, coding, multimodal, and multilingual tasks relative to their sizes.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: image, audio, video, and text data
extraction_data.research_problem: Building a model with strong generalist capabilities across modalities alongside cutting-edge understanding and reasoning performance in each respective domain
extraction_data.finetuning_task: post-training to improve overall quality, enhance target capabilities, and ensure alignment and safety criteria are met
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini models are multimodal from the beginning, supporting text, images, audio, and video inputs with interleaved sequences. They can natively output images using discrete image tokens.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Multimodal and multilingual dataset from web documents, books, code, images, audio, and video
extraction_data.application: Wide range of applications including complex tasks, reasoning, and multimodal tasks
extraction_data.extension: Multi-query attention and native image token output
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: A performance-optimized model in terms of cost as well as latency that delivers significant performance across a wide range of tasks. This model exhibits strong reasoning performance and broad multimodal capabilities.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Multimodal and multilingual dataset from web documents, books, code, images, audio, and video
extraction_data.application: Performance-optimized for cost and latency across a wide range of tasks
extraction_data.extension: Multi-query attention and native image token output
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Our most efficient model, designed to run on-device. It is trained by distilling from larger Gemini models. It is 4-bit quantized for deployment and provides best-in-class performance.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Multimodal and multilingual dataset from web documents, books, code, images, audio, and video
extraction_data.application: On-device applications, summarization, and reading comprehension
extraction_data.research_problem: Multimodal language understanding and generation for on-device applications
extraction_data.extension: Multi-query attention and native image token output
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Our most efficient model, designed to run on-device. It is trained by distilling from larger Gemini models. It is 4-bit quantized for deployment and provides best-in-class performance.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Multimodal and multilingual dataset from web documents, books, code, images, audio, and video
extraction_data.application: On-device applications, summarization, and reading comprehension
extraction_data.research_problem: Multimodal language understanding and generation for on-device applications
extraction_data.extension: Multi-query attention and native image token output
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini models are a family of highly capable multimodal models that can operate across modalities and a diverse set of global languages simultaneously, achieving state-of-the-art performance in zero-shot evaluation across various image and video understanding tasks.
extraction_data.application: Image understanding, video understanding, multimodal reasoning, language understanding, text generation, image captioning, document understanding
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini models are a family of highly capable multimodal models that can operate across modalities and a diverse set of global languages simultaneously, achieving state-of-the-art performance in zero-shot evaluation across various image and video understanding tasks.
extraction_data.application: Image understanding, video understanding, multimodal reasoning, language understanding, text generation, image captioning, document understanding
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Nano-1 outperforms both USM and Whisper on all audio datasets except FLEURS, demonstrating strong audio understanding capabilities.
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini's primary innovation is the multimodal capability, enabling the model to process and reason across text, vision, and audio modalities. The post-training approach enhances capabilities such as coding, multilingual, and safety alignment.
extraction_data.application: Multimodal reasoning, chat, general language tasks
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning, Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Ultra 1.0's primary innovation is the enhanced multimodal capability and post-training approach, which further improves capabilities such as coding, multilingual, and safety alignment compared to Gemini Pro 1.0.
extraction_data.application: Multimodal reasoning, chat, general language tasks
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning, Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Highly capable multimodal models for a wide range of tasks, including complex tasks such as preparing for a job interview, debugging code, and writing social media captions.
extraction_data.application: Conversational AI service (Gemini Advanced), enterprise API use (Gemini API Ultra)
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models
